Not in the “potential” sense we’re always chasing—like an incomplete project or a half-read book—but the things that are *meant* to stay unresolved. message.content:
I’ve been thinking lately about the beauty of unfinished things.  

Not in the “potential” sense we’re always chasing—like an incomplete project or a half-read book—but the things that are *meant* to stay unresolved.
